name: @metorial/superhuman-gmail
description: Workflow-oriented Gmail built around conversations: search threads, load full thread context with reply-ready headers, triage with archive, read/unread, star, labels, trash, restore, or permanent delete, manage threaded reply drafts, send replies in-thread, and poll the Gmail history API for new mail and label changes. Omits generic admin/settings CRUD and features that need a custom datastore (read receipts, team comments, shared links, persistent snooze).
skills: star and mark conversations read or unread
detect new mail and label changes
